parsed_review.summary: CP00-037 implements RP00.P02.M07.S09 Test And Golden Case Set State transition enforcement as a deterministic, metadata-only precheck. precheckControlPlaneTestAndGoldenCaseSetStateTransitionEnforcement consumes only the RP00.P02.M07.S08 secondary workflow path result (guarded by entrypoint_id==='test_and_golden_case_set', secondary_workflow_path_subphase_id==='RP00.P02.M07.S08', full S08 result assertion, and carried allow_metadata_only + applied checks), then emits a frozen receipt for secondary_workflow_path_ready -> state_transition_enforced and hands off to RP00.P02.M07.S10. The slice mirrors (and is marginally stricter than) the established sibling state-transition-enforcement slices and shares the normalizeOptionalStateTransitionClaim helper. All side-effect flags (test execution, golden generation/persistence, audit ledger/event, runtime permission/AuthZ/permission-engine/security-trimming, service logic, runtime route, db/storage/product-state) are hardcoded false and independently asserted; unsafe/unknown/invalid-transition claims fail closed by throwing. Verified: 6/6 focused tests pass, 527/527 full service suite passes, and npm run rp00:control-plane:validate fails ONLY on the five not-yet-created docs/closeout-packs/cp00-037 evidence files (expected at this stage). Only the 8 in-scope files are modified. No boundary violations found.

boundary_checks.consume_only_s08_output: pass - input gated by entrypoint id, secondary_workflow_path_subphase_id==='RP00.P02.M07.S08', assertControlPlaneTestAndGoldenCaseSetSecondaryWorkflowPathResult, and allow_metadata_only/applied checks; cross-fixture check feeds the S08 fixture output into S09 and matches exactly.
boundary_checks.frozen_metadata_only_receipt: pass - result, state_transition_receipt, and nested arrays are Object.freeze'd; tests assert Object.isFrozen on all three.
boundary_checks.state_transition_secondary_to_enforced: pass - allowedStateTransitions binds secondary_workflow_path_ready -> state_transition_enforced with canonical ruleRef; any other from/to throws 'invalid state transition'.
boundary_checks.no_real_data: pass - only synthetic refs carried from S08; no_real_data:true asserted.
boundary_checks.no_test_execution: pass - test_execution_permitted:false; function performs no execution, doesNotExecuteTests:true.
boundary_checks.no_audit_event_write: pass - audit_event_write_permitted:false; existing audit_event_ref carried, not written.
boundary_checks.no_microphase_or_phase_or_rp00_completio: pass - completesSourceMicroPhase:false, scope_policy does_not_complete_RP00_P02_M07/RP00_P02/close_RP00:true, weighted ledger terminal:false with nextSubphaseId RP00.P02.M07.S10.
boundary_checks.no_h00_c00_replacement: pass - does_not_replace_H00_or_C00:true; review-only metadata, H00/C00 untouched.
boundary_checks.fail_closed_enforcement: pass - 31 forbidden claims + unknown truthy claims + invalid transition + missing/denied S08 inputs all throw; validated by unit tests and validator live-checks.

parsed_review.residual_risk: Pack artifacts are clean and fully self-consistent; no code/contract/test/fixture defects identified. Two operational (non-pack) cautions for the closeout step: (1) npm run rp00:control-plane:validate still fails until the five docs/closeout-packs/cp00-037 evidence files (manifest.json, command-evidence.json, claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) are created and construction-inspection sets control_plane_test_and_golden_case_set_state_transition_enforcement_verified=true; this review is the documented prerequisite for those. (2) Untracked, out-of-scope items exist in the working tree (.DS_Store and the 'Law Firm OS UI/' directory) unrelated to this pack — ensure they are excluded from the CP00-037 commit so only the 8 in-scope files are staged. Forward-looking: state_transition_receipt carries non-required extra keys (matter_id, secondary_workflow_path_behavior_ref, decision_reason) beyond the 15 requiredStateTransitionReceiptFields floor; this is intentional and explicitly asserted, consistent with sibling slices.
